snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: Diagnostics support-bundle worker and cancellation exact-candidate review
reviewers.independence: The independent reviewer examined the frozen diagnostics worker, cancellation, confinement, redaction and exact-output evidence and returned CLEAR before Product Planning bound the current-only governance surfaces.

dimensions.summary: Existing Diagnostics, API, Quality and B1.14 acceptance owners locate preview, export, cancellation and residual boundaries without a new document or product surface.
Owners agree on a sender-bound request, 2 MiB exact output, 64 MiB/30-second worker, main-held temporary identity, safe cancellation races and local-only redacted data.
Five exact selectors update only existing partial PIGE-DIAG-002 and E1.07 projections; semantic lock v3 has 1,197 claims and every Requirement, Exit and phase status remains unchanged.
Development gets one executable contract for bounded worker publication, private descriptor and destination fencing, unsafe-content rejection and renderer-owned cancellation.
No Markdown file or decision is added; owner replacement text and semantic-neutral manifest compression keep every leanness budget unchanged and green.

verification.evidence: The exact 24-path Development plus governed candidate passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all quality dimensions.

verification.command: Exact candidate test, package and distribution evidence
verification.evidence: Focused 5/66, full 106/1,216, typecheck/build and macOS package/distribution smokes pass. The exact distributable and 1,226-entry manifest preserve packaged renderer, preload, Pi, workers and strict ad-hoc integrity.

verification.command: npm run verify:dependencies && npm run verify:traceability && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: The candidate retains 57 dependency records with zero waivers; CON-001 through CON-004 and semantic lock v3/1,197 pass with no Requirement, Exit or phase status drift.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass with 56 Markdown files, 3,466 entry words, 4,183 trace lines, 249,924 trace bytes and 1,212,959 governed Markdown bytes.

coordination.compatibility: This candidate moves local support-bundle publication into a bounded cancelable worker while preserving redaction, local-only export, durable vault truth, dependencies and all statuses.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze exact 24-path bytes and evidence; the independent reviewer returned CLEAR. Product Planning synchronized existing owners, acceptance, semantic lock and this current-only recipe without changing Development files.

nonBlockingRisks: Optional reviewed bundle content, progress and restart-resumable export semantics remain open.
Broader platform/path, signed installed-platform and manual cancellation matrices remain open.
The export is process-local rather than a durable Job; vault data, Backup/Restore, providers, permissions and dependencies are unchanged.
